content.query:
create view v_SalesData
-- drop view v_SalesData
as
SELECT          Division, Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], Warehouse, [Order Entry User]
,               cast([Order ID] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Order ID], Cast([Invoice ID] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID], Date, Brand, [Product Category], [Part ID - Actual], [Part ID - Go Forward], [Part Description]
,               [Supplier ID], [Sales Amt], [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN [Invoice ID] IN ('70-8000757', '30-8000342', '30-8000345', ',70-8000832', '70-8000833', '20-8000101',
'30-8000354', '70-8000874', '70-8000578', '70-8000515', '70-8000859', '70-8000616', '30-8000305',
'70-8000621', '70-8000539', '70-8000538', 'LBL1006726', 'LBL8000214', 'LBL8000212', 'LBL8000247',
'LBL8000241', 'LBL8000234', 'LBL8000244', 'LBL8000228', 'LBL8000230', 'LBL8000221', 'LBL8000222',
'LBL8000242', 'LBN8000003'
) then 'Sales' when [Invoice ID] like '2400%' then 'Sales' when [Sales Qty] < 0 or [Sales Amt] < 0 then 'Returns' else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type],
CASE 
    -- AFS Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('AFS') 
            THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2023-02-01' THEN [Cost AFS]
            ELSE [Cost M3] 
        END

    -- Other Commercial Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Other Commercial')
             THEN
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2023-02-01' THEN [Cost L]
            ELSE [Cost M3] 
        END

    -- Zeroll Cost Logic
    WHEN Brand IN ('Zeroll')
             THEN
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2023-02-01' THEN [Cost L]
            ELSE [Cost M3] 
        END

    -- International Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'International' and Brand <> 'Kold Draft' 
            THEN 
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' THEN [Cost G]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Kold Draft Cost Logic
    WHEN [Brand] = 'Kold Draft'
            THEN 
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2021-04-01' THEN [Cost K]
           WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' THEN [Cost G]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Admiral Craft Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2023-11-01' THEN [Cost ADC]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Avanti Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Avanti') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2023-06-01' then [Cost APR]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Vinotemp Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Vinotemp') THEN [Cost M3]

    -- Westbend, Yonanas, Vinturi Cost Logic
    WHEN Brand IN ('West Bend', 'Yonanas', 'Vinturi', 'Jelly Belly') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2021-07-01' then [Cost WBM]
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Excalibur
    WHEN Brand IN ('Excalibur') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2021-05-01' then [Cost L]
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Omega
    WHEN Brand IN ('Omega') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2021-05-01' then [Cost O]
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Countertop Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Countertop') THEN
        CASE 
           WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
           ELSE [Cost M3]
        END

    -- Kalorik Cost Logic
    WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Kalorik') THEN
        CASE 
            WHEN Date < '2024-02-01' then [Cost ECM]
            ELSE [Cost M3]
        END
    -- Default Logic
    ELSE [Cost M3]
END AS [Cost]
, [Ship to Name], [Ship to Address 1], [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code], [Bill to Name], [Bill to Address 1], [Bill to Address 2], [Bill to City], [Bill to State], [Bill to Zip Code]
                FROM
(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               A.[Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'a' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]
FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				SS.[Sub-Brand] as Brand
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCA.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCA.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AO_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = D.[Part ID]

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'l' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				SS.[Sub-Brand] as Brand
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost L]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN		SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
LEFT JOIN       SCL.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCL.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'
AND				DF.Company = 'L'
AND				(AC2.Category NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY') or AC2.Category is NULL)

--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               [Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'o' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				SS.[Sub-Brand] as Brand
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost O]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCO.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCO.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCO.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCO.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'
AND				AC.UserField1 NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY', 'INTERCOMPA')
AND				AC.Customer <> 'ASB001'
AND				DF.Company = 'O'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OW_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OA_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = E.[Part ID]

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'ge' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				'G' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'
AND             SS.[Division] = 'GWT'
AND             ATS.Customer not in ('AFS', 'AVANPRO', 'BEVLES', 'EDGECRA', 'LEGIINC', 'WESTBEN')
) A

UNION ALL


SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               [Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'gcom' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				'G' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode)) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
--,				NULL as [Cost Visual]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'
AND             SS.Division = 'Commercial'
AND             ATS.Customer not in ('AFS', 'AVANPRO', 'BEVLES', 'EDGECRA', 'LEGIINC', 'WESTBEN')

) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GA_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GL_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GAV_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GVI_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = E.[Part ID]

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'gcon' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				'G' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode)) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
--,				NULL as [Cost Visual]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID collate database_default = P.ID
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'
AND             SS.Division in ('Countertop', 'Compact')
AND             ATS.Customer not in ('AFS', 'AVANPRO', 'BEVLES', 'EDGECRA', 'LEGIINC', 'WESTBEN')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GLZEX_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GO_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GW_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = E.[Part ID]

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR] as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'e' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT          SS.Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CO.CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CO.CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               SL.INVOICE_ID as [Invoice ID]
,               COL.WAREHOUSE_ID as Warehouse
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID - Actual]
,               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], P.ID) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,               SS.Description as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CPC.COST as [Cost ECM]
,               CA.CITY AS [Ship to City]
,               CA.STATE as [Ship to State]
,               CA.ZIPCODE as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
LEFT JOIN       ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE_LINE SL ON CO.ID = SL.CUST_ORDER_ID AND COL.LINE_NO = SL.CUST_ORDER_LINE_NO
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON P.ID = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       ECM.CUST_ADDRESS CA ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = CA.CUSTOMER_ID AND CO.SHIP_TO_ADDR_NO = CA.ADDR_NO
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2020-01-01'
AND             (C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' AND C.USER_3 <> 'GWT' OR C.USER_3 IS NULL)

) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EAV_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EW_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EO_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = E.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EVINO_Cost
) F            on A.Division = F.Division and A.Company = F.Company and A.[Customer ID] = F.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = F.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID - Actual] = F.[Part ID]

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'w' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]
FROM
(
SELECT          SS.Division
,               'Westbend' as Company
,               CO.CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               NULL AS [Invoice ID]
,               COL.WAREHOUSE_ID as Warehouse
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID - Actual]
,               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], P.ID) as [Part ID - Go Forward] 
,               SS.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               (UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST) as [Cost WBM]
,               CA.CITY AS [Ship to City]
,               CA.STATE as [Ship to State]
,               CA.ZIPCODE as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM            WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            WBM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		WBM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON P.ID = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       WBM.CUST_ADDRESS CA ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = CA.CUSTOMER_ID AND CO.SHIP_TO_ADDR_NO = CA.ADDR_NO
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2020-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'

) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               [Cost K]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'k' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division
,				'K' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,                               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID - Actual]
,				COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced, 0) as [Cost K]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [Ship to City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [Ship to State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCK.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCK.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCK.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCK.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS on ATD.StockCode = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       SCK.SorMaster SM on AC.Customer = SM.Customer and ATD.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN       SCK.SorDetail SD on ATD.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder and ATD.SalesOrderLine = SD.SalesOrderLine
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2020-01-01'

) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, COALESCE(B.CUNO, A.[Customer ID]) as [Customer ID], COALESCE(B.CUNM, A.[Customer Name]) as [Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'av' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
    (
SELECT			SS.Division
,				'Avanti' as Company
,				[cust-code] as [Customer ID]
,				[cust-name] as [Customer Name]
,				[cust-po-number] as [Customer PO]
,                               NULL as [Order ID]
,				aih.[ref-num] as [Invoice ID]
,                               aii.[shipping-location-key] as Warehouse
,				aih.[ref-date] as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID - Actual]
,				COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], aii.[item-code]) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,                               aii.[item-name] as [Part Description]
,				p.[primary-supplier-key] as [Supplier ID]
,				CASE WHEN aih.[ref-num] like 'CM%' then [total-item-price]*-1 else [total-item-price] end as [Sales Amt]
,				CASE WHEN aih.[ref-num] like 'CM%' then qty*-1 else qty end as [Sales Qty]
,				aii.[total-sales-cost] as [Cost APR]
,                               aih.[ship-to-city] as [Ship to City]
,                               aih.[ship-to-state] as [Ship to State]
,                               aih.[ship-to-zip] as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
JOIN			APR.custname cn on aih.[cust-key] = cn.[cust-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.product p on aii.[item-key] = p.[product-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.category c on p.[category-key] = c.[category-key]
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON aii.[item-code] = SS.[Item Number]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2020-01-01'
AND				aih.[cust-key] NOT IN ('23117', '23124')
--AND             aih.[ref-num] NOT LIKE 'CM%'
AND             C.[system-id] = 'Avanti'

        ) A

LEFT JOIN

        (
SELECT          CUNO, CUNM, ALCU
FROM            M3.OCUSMA
        ) B     ON A.[Customer ID] = B.ALCU

        UNION ALL

        SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               [Cost ADC]
,               'adc' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
select      COALESCE(SS.Division, SS2.Division) as Division
,           'ERP1' as Company
,           c.customer as [Customer ID]
,           c.name as [Customer Name]
,           oh.cu_po as [Customer PO]
,           cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Order ID]
,           cast(oh.[order] as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID]
,           oh.warehouse as [Warehouse]
,           oh.invc_date as [Date]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Sub-Brand], SS2.[Sub-Brand]) AS [Brand]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Finance Brand], SS2.[Finance Brand]) as [Finance Brand]
,			COALESCE(SS.Category, SS2.Category) as [Product Category]
,           i.item as [Part ID - Actual]
,           i.item as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,           COALESCE(SS.Description, SS2.Description) as [Part Description]
,           ol.vendor as [Supplier ID]
,           ol.q_itd*ol.price as [Sales Amt]
,           ol.q_itd as [Sales Qty]
,           ol.cost_a*ol.q_itd as [Cost ADC]
,           NULL as [Ship to City]
,           oh.state as [Ship to State]
,           oh.postal_code as [Ship to Zip Code]
from        ADC.oe_head oh
JOIN        ADC.oe_line ol on oh.[order] = ol.[order] and oh.invc_seq=ol.invc_seq and ol.q_comm <> 0
join        ADC.customer c on oh.customer = c.customer
join        ADC.item i on ol.item = i.item
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON i.item = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS2 ON i.item = SS2.[Item Number]
where           oh.company_oe = 'AD'
and             ol.company_oe = 'AD'
and             c.company_cu = 'AD'
and             i.company_it = 'AD'
and             ol.ar_flag = 'True'
and             oh.posted = 'True'
and             oh.post_date is not null
and             ol.invc_date is not null
and             ol.rec_type in ('I', 'C')
and         oh.post_date >= '2020-01-01'
)A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost M3]/**A.[Sales Qty]*/ as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'vin' as test, [Ship to Name], [Ship to Address 1], [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               [Bill to Name], [Bill to Address 1], [Bill to Address 2], [Bill to City], [Bill to State], [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			SS.Division 
,				'Netsuite' as Company
,				cast(E.id as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Customer ID]
,				E.altname as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,                               NULL as [Order ID]
,				cast(uniquekey as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Invoice ID]
,                               NULL as Warehouse
,                               NULL as [Order Entry User]
,				trandate as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,				CAST(itemid as NVARCHAR(4000)) as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], CAST(itemid as NVARCHAR(4000))) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				SS.Description as [Part Description]
,				I.vendorname as [Supplier ID]
,			    amount as [Sales Amt]
,				itemcount as [Sales Qty]
,				SI.costestimate*-1.00/**-1.00/NULLIF(itemcount,0)*/ as [Cost M3]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Name]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Address 1]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Address 2]
,                       NULL as [Ship to City]
,                       NULL as [Ship to State]
,                       NULL as [Ship to Zip Code]
,                       NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Entity E on SI.entity = E.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Class C on I.class = C.id
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON CAST(itemid as NVARCHAR(4000)) = SS.[Item Number]
WHERE			trandate >= '2020-01-01'
--AND				amount > 0
AND				SI.[type] = 'CustInvc'
AND				itemid <> 'UNVERIFIED CREDITS'
) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO], Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID - Actual], A.[Part ID - Go Forward], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost M3]/**A.[Sales Qty]*/ as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'M3' as test, [Ship to Name], [Ship to Address 1], [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               [Bill to Name], [Bill to Address 1], [Bill to Address 2], [Bill to City], [Bill to State], [Bill to Zip Code]
from
(
SELECT   distinct SS.Division
,         'M3' as Company
,          ODH.CUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer PO]
,          OL.ORNO AS [Order ID]
,          LE.CINO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Invoice ID]
,          OL.WHLO as Warehouse
,          OH.RESP as [Order Entry User]
,          LE.ACDT  as [Date]
,               SS.[Sub-Brand] AS [Brand]
,               SS.[Finance Brand]
,				SS.Category as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID - Actual]
,           COALESCE(SS.[Item Number], IM.ITNO) as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,           SS.Description as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Supplier ID]
,           CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND ODL.POSX = 0 THEN 0
            WHEN OH.ORTP IN ('E80', 'E90') and OL.SAPR*ODL.IVQT*LE.ARAT > 0 then OL.SAPR*ODL.IVQT*LE.ARAT*-1
            WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 THEN 0 
            WHEN LE.CINO = '2999910570' then 451*ODL.IVQT else  OL.SAPR*ODL.IVQT*LE.ARAT END as [Sales Amt]
,           CASE WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 then 0 else ODL.IVQT end as [Sales Qty]
,          CASE WHEN MP.STRT = 'KIT' AND ODL.POSX = 0 THEN 0 
           WHEN LE.CUAM = 0 then 0 ELSE ODL.DCOS END as [Cost M3]
,               COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OA2.CUNM, OC.CUNM) as [Ship to Name]
,               COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OA2.CUA1, OC.CUA1) as [Ship to Address 1]
,               COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OA2.CUA2, OC.CUA2) as [Ship to Address 2]
,          COALESCE(OA.TOWN, OA2.TOWN, OC.TOWN) AS [Ship to City]
,           COALESCE(OA.ECAR, OA2.ECAR, OC.ECAR) AS [Ship to State]
,          COALESCE(OA.PONO, OA2.PONO, OC.PONO) AS [Ship to Zip Code]
,               OC.CUNM as [Bill to Name], OC.CUA1 as [Bill to Address 1], OC.CUA2 as [Bill to Address 2], OC.TOWN as [Bill to City], OC.ECAR as [Bill to State], OC.PONO as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN                    M3.OOHEAD OH on ODH.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX AND LE.CINO = ODL.EXIN
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and cs.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB CS2 on IM.ITCL = CS2.STKY and cs2.STCO = 'ITCL'
LEFT JOIN               BI_ItemMaster SS ON IM.ITNO = SS.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN               M3.MPDHED MP ON IM.ITNO = MP.PRNO AND MP.STRT = 'KIT'
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOADRE OA ON ODH.ORNO = OA.ORNO AND OA.ADRT = '1'
LEFT JOIN               M3.OCUSAD OA2 ON OC.CUNO = OA2.CUNO AND ODH.ADID = OA2.ADID AND ODH.ADID <> '' AND OA2.ADRT = '1'
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
and             IM.ITCL <> 'ZZZ'
AND             OC.OREF <> 'TLC INTERCOMPANY'
AND             ODH.ORNO NOT IN ('1000001170', '1000026212', '5000004149', '1000020120')
AND             LE.CINO NOT IN ('2400163940', '2999910397', '2999910571', '2400083573', '2400083579', '2400083575', '2400088771'
                                , '2400088775', '2400088773', '2400088788', '2400102150', '2400081300', '2400068696', '2400060092'
                                , '2400053326', '2400052745', '2400052544', '2400052542', '2400053348', '2400053347', '2400052543', '2400054060',
                                '2400054065', '2400053659', '2400060082', '2400060083', '2400054063', '2400054064', '2400053660', '2400058368',
                                '2400058376', '2400058378', '2400058380', '2400058374', '2400058366', '2400058382', '2400058372', '2400058358',
                                '2400058362', '2400058364', '2400058356',  '2400058360', '2400058384', '2400058370'
)

) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, 'LEGIONCUSTOMERID' as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO], A.Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], NULL as [Product Category], 'LEGIONPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual], 'LEGIONPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'leg' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT			'Commercial' as Division
,				'Legion' as Company
,				'LEGIONCUSTOMERID' as [Customer ID]
,				Customer as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,                               NULL as [Order ID]
,				Invoice as [Invoice ID]
,                               Null as Warehouse
,				Date as [Date]
,				'Legion' as [Brand]
,               'Other Commercial' as [Finance Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				'LEGIONPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               'LEGIONPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			    Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
,                               NULL as [Ship to City]
,                               NULL as [Ship to State]
,                               NULL as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			SCK.LegionSales
WHERE                   Customer NOT LIKE '%GWT%'
AND                     Customer NOT LIKE '%GREENFIELD W%'
) A

UNION ALL

SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, 'ORIENCUSTOMERID' as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO], Warehouse, NULL as [Order Entry User]
,               A.[Order ID], A.[Invoice ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Finance Brand], NULL as [Product Category], 'ORIENPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual], 'ORIENPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG], NULL as [Cost ADC]
,               'orien' as test, NULL as [Ship to Name], NULL as [Ship to Address 1], NULL as [Ship to Address 2], [Ship to City], [Ship to State], [Ship to Zip Code]
,               NULL as [Bill to Name], NULL as [Bill to Address 1], NULL as [Bill to Address 2], NULL as [Bill to City], NULL as [Bill to State], NULL as [Bill to Zip Code]

FROM
(
SELECT	Division
,				'Orien' as Company
,				CustomerID as [Customer ID]
,				CustomerName as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				NULL as [Order ID]
,                               NULL as [Invoice ID]
,                               NULL as Warehouse
,				Date as [Date]
,				'Orien' as [Brand]
,               NULL as [Finance Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				'ORIENPARTACTUAL' as [Part ID - Actual]
,                               'ORIENPARTGOFORWARD' as [Part ID - Go Forward]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			        Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
,                               NULL as [Ship to City]
,                               NULL as [Ship to State]
,                               NULL as [Ship to Zip Code]
FROM			        SCK.OrienSales
) A
) AS X
